title: Christmas Mason Jar and Straw - Re-useable Sturdy Plastic Childrens Mason Jar (Reindeer)
features: Christmas Mason Jar Drinking Cup and Straw
Embrace the festive spirit with our delightful Christmas Mason Jar Drinking Cup, a perfect addition to your holiday celebrations
This charming cup features a whimsical Santa character adorning the front, bringing a touch of cheer to your beverage experience.
Crafted from durable plastic, it is designed to withstand the rigours of holiday gatherings while ensuring safety and convenience.
The cup is equipped with a vibrant red screw-on lid and a classic plastic striped straw, making it ideal for sipping your favourite seasonal drinks, from juices, milks to festive mocktails.
With a generous capacity of 500ml, this Mason Jar measures approximately 14.5cm in height and 8cm in diameter, providing ample space for your beverages.
Please note that this product is hand wash only and is not suitable for use in dishwashers or microwaves, ensuring its longevity and maintaining its festive charm for many seasons to come.
